<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this short and specific. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## How to verify

<!-- Commands / steps a reviewer can run. -->

```bash
bun test test/
bun run typecheck
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (one file per module, under `test/`)
- [ ] `bun test test/` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] If this touches access control, an ACL test covers it
